I would like to request the implementation of an equivalent function to scipy.stats.rankdata in CuPy to support GPU-accelerated ranking operations. The rankdata function in scipy.stats is widely used for ranking elements in an array, especially in scientific and machine learning applications. However, currently, CuPy lacks a native implementation of this function, limiting the ability to perform efficient ranking operations on large datasets directly on the GPU.
